SEARCH
Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.topvoter

Class TopVoterHandler

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.topvoter.TopVoterHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class TopVoterHandler extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Handles top voter rankings and statistics.

    Constructor
    Description
    TopVoterHandler(VotingPluginMain plugin)
    Constructs a new top voter handler.

    • TopVoterHandler

      Constructs a new top voter handler.

  • Method Details

    • bungeeHandleResets

      public boolean bungeeHandleResets()
      Checks if bungee should handle resets.
      Returns:
      true if bungee handles resets

    • getMonthlyTopVotersAtTime

      public LinkedHashMap<TopVoterPlayer,Integer> getMonthlyTopVotersAtTime(LocalDateTime atTime)
      Gets monthly top voters at a specific time.
      Parameters:
      atTime - the time to check
      Returns:
      map of top voters and their vote counts

    • getTopVoterBlackList

      public ArrayList<String> getTopVoterBlackList()
      Gets the top voter blacklist.
      Returns:
      list of blacklisted players

    • getTopVotersOfMonth

      public LinkedHashMap<TopVoterPlayer,Integer> getTopVotersOfMonth(YearMonth month, HashMap<UUID,ArrayList<com.bencodez.simpleapi.sql.Column>> cols)
      Gets top voters for a specific month.
      Parameters:
      month - the year-month to check
      cols - player data columns
      Returns:
      map of top voters and their vote counts

    • getTopVotersWeekly

      public String[] getTopVotersWeekly()
      Gets weekly top voters as formatted strings.
      Returns:
      array of formatted top voter lines

      public void loadLastMonth()
      Loads last month's top voter data.

      public void loadPreviousMonthTopVoters()
      Loads previous month top voters for all configured months.

      public void register()
      Registers this handler as a listener.

    • resetTotals

      public void resetTotals(TopVoter topVoter)
      Resets vote totals for a specific period.

      public void resetVoteShopLimit(String shopIdent)
      Resets vote shop limits for a specific shop.
      Parameters:
      shopIdent - the shop identifier

    • sortByValues

      public LinkedHashMap<TopVoterPlayer,Integer> sortByValues(LinkedHashMap<TopVoterPlayer,Integer> map, boolean order)
      Sorts top voters by their vote counts.
      Parameters:
      map - the map to sort
      order - true for ascending order, false for descending
      Returns:
      sorted map of top voters

    • storeTopVoters

      public void storeTopVoters(TopVoter top)
      Stores top voter data to file.
      Parameters:
      top - the top voter period to store

      Returns:
      the string[]

      Returns:
      array of formatted top voter lines

      public void updateTopVoters(LinkedHashMap<TopVoter,LinkedHashMap<TopVoterPlayer,Integer>> tempTopVoter)

      tempTopVoter - map of top voter periods to player rankings
